label: Notable Historical Figures
description:
Occupation/field taxonomy (philosopher, scientist, military leader, statesman, artist, writer, religious figure, explorer, mathematician, architect, composer, inventor, etc.) with era anchors. Import scripts cover Pantheon 2.0 (HPI-ranked notable figures, MIT/Harvard) and Wikidata humans with 10+ Wikipedia language editions born before 1900.

Import scripts: Pantheon 2.0 CSV (pantheon.world), Wikidata SPARQL pre-1900 notable people.

Atom IDs: person:field:*, person:subfield:*, person:era:*, person:*
attribution: Pantheon 2.0 (MIT Media Lab / Harvard Dataverse) | Wikidata
